basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate, Junior Research Fellow and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate, Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) has released the official Project/CMET/02 Recruitment 2026 Notification at its official website. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the MANIT Bhopal Research Associate, Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications including Master’s Degree in Electrical Engineering, MBA (Energy Management/Economics), or B.E. in Electrical/CSE/IoT as per the post requirement can apply through Email mode on or before 26 July 2026. The official notification PDF and appli

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits for each post. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Electrical Engineering (Power system/Power Electronics or equivalent) or MBA(Energy Management/Economics) or equivalent degree for RA; Masters in Electrical Engineering (Power system/Power Electronics or equivalent) for SRF; B.E. (Electrical, CSE, IOT) for JRF.
qualification.details: Research Associate (RA): Masters in Electrical Engineering (Power system/Power Electronics or equivalent) or MBA(Energy Management/Economics) or equivalent degree. Minimum 02 Years experience for Non-Ph.D. candidates or Ph.D. Degree completed/submitted. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Masters in Electrical Engineering (Power system/Power Electronics or equivalent). Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E. (Electrical, CSE, IOT).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 80,000/- per month (RA), Rs. 55,000/- per month (SRF), Rs. 45,000/- per month (JRF)

selection_process: Scrutiny and shortlisting of applications Personal interaction and document verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MANIT Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MANIT Bhopal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MANIT Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate (RA): Masters in Electrical Engineering (Power system/Power Electronics or equivalent) or MBA(Energy Management/Economics) or equivalent degree. Minimum 02 Years experience for Non-Ph.D. candidates or Ph.D. Degree completed/submitted. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Masters in Electrical Engineering (Power system/Power Electronics or equivalent). Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E. (Electrical, CSE, IOT).

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits for each post. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny and shortlisting of applications Personal interaction and document verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MANIT Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the MANIT Bhopal Project/CMET/02 posts is 26th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project/CMET/02 posts at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for the Project/CMET/02 recruitment drive at MANIT Bhopal. These positions are distributed among Research Associate, Senior Research Fellow, and Junior Research Fellow roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application form along with self-attested documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position, candidates must possess a B.E. degree in Electrical, CSE, or IOT disciplines. This is a key requirement for eligibility for the JRF role.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: The Research Associate (RA) position at MANIT Bhopal offers a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 80,000/-. This is a competitive stipend for research professionals.

faq.question: Q6. Does MANIT Bhopal offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Specific details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories are not explicitly mentioned in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for precise information on age relaxation policies.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these project-based positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial scrutiny and shortlisting of applications. Shortlisted candidates will then proceed to a personal interaction and document verification stage.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, mark sheets, testimonials, and any relevant experience certificates. A valid ID proof is also typically required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: The official website for Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal is https://cmet.manit.ac.in/. This is the primary source for all official information and updates.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: Based on the provided data, no application fee is mentioned for any of the posts in this recruitment drive. Candidates can proceed with their application without worrying about any fee payment.
